title: TriggerEvent
description: Event published by an NVR adapter or HA poller when something potentially noteworthy happens. Triage worker consumes this from the bus and decides whether to enrich + route to VLM (see §05).

trace_id.description: Distributed trace ID; propagated from ingress through every downstream call.

timestamp.description: Event timestamp from the camera/NVR (ISO 8601 UTC).

camera_id.description: Camera identifier (matches camera record in spatial model, §13).

event_type.description: What kind of trigger this is.

on_camera_ai_opinion.description: If the NVR/camera supplied an on-camera AI assessment, surface it (low-bar signal that VLM may confirm/override).

bbox.description: [x1, y1, x2, y2] in image-space pixels.

privacy_tier.description: Privacy tier (mirrors common/privacy-tier.schema.json — inlined here until Epic 02 introduces a robust $ref resolver in the codegen pipeline).

retention_days.description: Retention policy for any frames/clips attached to this event.
